title: elymus atratus
intro: Elymus atratus, also known as purple wheatgrass or black wheatgrass, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Elymus atratus include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Elymus atratus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or topical cream, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
